overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a passenger's journey in a Delamain AI taxi through Night City during golden hour. The camera transitions from an exterior view of futuristic skyscrapers and elevated highways to the retro-futuristic vehicle interior, showcasing detailed cyberpunk architecture and automated vehicle design.

agents.ego_description: passenger sitting in the rear seat observing the cyberpunk cityscape through the hexagonal-patterned window

entered.detail: distinctive hexagonal pattern overlay on the vehicle window characteristic of Delamain taxis
metal safety barriers along the elevated roadway
tall glass and steel buildings with cyberpunk architecture lining the highway
low golden sun creating warm lens flares and long shadows
illuminated vertical advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from the passenger seat of a Delamain taxi driving along an elevated highway through a futuristic city. Golden hour sunlight streams through the hexagonal-patterned window, illuminating towering skyscrapers and neon billboards while the vehicle moves steadily forward.

events.description: camera begins slow pan from side window toward vehicle interior revealing the headrest screen

agents.ego_description: continuing the journey while the camera perspective shifts from exterior to interior focus

entered.detail: large industrial building with pink facade and number 02 marking visible from the highway
structural columns supporting the elevated roadway passing close to the vehicle
black display screen embedded in the driver's seat headrest with Delamain logo

segments.scene_description: The taxi continues along the elevated highway passing industrial buildings and support structures. Around the 20-second mark, the camera begins panning left from the side window toward the interior, revealing the distinctive Delamain headrest screen and transitioning focus from the exterior cityscape to the vehicle's luxury interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: Delamain automated taxi interior with retro-futuristic design

events.description: view transitions from exterior highway to focused interior showing the Delamain headrest screen and wood-trimmed dashboard

agents.ego_description: observing the luxury taxi interior featuring grey leather seats, wood trim, and digital control panels

entered.detail: retro-futuristic dashboard with wood paneling and illuminated controls
white and wood-trimmed steering wheel with chrome accents
grey upholstered passenger seat with orange accent stitching
interior roof with ambient lighting and control panels

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its pan to focus entirely on the vehicle's interior, showcasing the Delamain taxi's retro-futuristic design. The headrest screen remains central while the dashboard, steering wheel, and luxury seating become visible. The vehicle continues moving through areas with greenery visible through the side windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street level view from inside taxi approaching destination

events.description: pedestrians visible walking on sidewalk outside the vehicle as it navigates city streets
intense golden hour sunlight streams through the side window creating bright lens flare

agents.ego_description: approaching destination with view of pedestrians and storefronts through the side window

notable_agents.action: walking on the sidewalk alongside the vehicle as it slows

entered.detail: people walking on the sidewalk visible through the side window
ground level commercial buildings with large windows
interior door panel with armrest and window controls

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the taxi driving at street level with pedestrians visible walking on the sidewalks. The camera captures the interior door panel and side window as intense golden sunlight creates lens flares. The vehicle appears to be slowing as it approaches its destination, with the Delamain headrest screen now positioned to the right of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a sweeping view of a futuristic cityscape into the intimate, luxury interior of an automated taxi. It begins from the passenger seat on an elevated highway, where golden hour sunlight streams through hexagonal windows to illuminate towering skyscrapers and neon billboards. As the vehicle passes industrial support structures, the camera pans left away from the exterior vista to reveal the distinctive Delamain headrest screen and the retro-futuristic dashboard. The scene then transitions to a focus on the vehicle's interior design while greenery flashes past the windows, before the taxi descends to street level where pedestrians appear on the sidewalks. Finally, the camera captures the interior door panel as intense golden sunlight creates lens flares while the vehicle slows toward its destination.
